creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
The port has been update to 0.2.0.1678 on 2022-04-19 by the following commit:
https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=3d03ce63e44a5a6e71f5ca483aef738efea8debf

Actually, the port has been update further up to version 0.4.1.1838; see commit
https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=1e44432921b50a9c6233e4c9cd0767021157e879

The reporter has not replied since the end of April, so I guess everything is working as intended and close the bug.
